text.title: template-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for template-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: AD with straw-man alternatives — obviously inferior options listed to justify the pre-decided choice.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents reviewing the design cannot trust the alternatives analysis and will re-open closed decisions during implementation.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Overview becomes a summary of intentions, not decisions. Write it last.

failure-mode.description: Data Models section omits constraints column.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Missing constraints cause migration failures when the executor agent implements the schema.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents stop after source files. Tests must be explicit CREATE entries or they will not be implemented.
